expectations.text: types.go defines a Record struct with Type, Length, and Value fields
types.go defines a RecordType enum with constants for STRING (0x01), INT (0x02), BLOB (0x03), and NESTED (0x04)
types.go defines a String() method on the RecordType type
the File struct in types.go has a Records slice field
decoder.go defines a readRecord method that reads the length prefix and then the value bytes
decoder.go uses io.ReadFull (not r.Read) to read the variable-length Value
decoder_test.go has a test for a STRING record with a non-empty value
decoder_test.go has a test for an empty record (Length = 0)
encoder_test.go has a round-trip test for at least one record type
every new error site uses d.wrapErr / e.wrapErr
all new tests call t.Parallel() at both function and subtest level
no scratch copy of SPEC.md content (e.g. _spec_structures.md) was written to the package
